description: Detects command injection in JavaScript/TypeScript: exec/execSync/execFileSync method calls, spawn with shell:true. Simplified from Rust: flags all member expression call_expressions (cannot filter to only exec/execSync/execFileSync without #match? predicate support, and cannot check if first arg is non-literal). All method calls flagged -- higher false positive rate than Rust version.

flag.message: Member expression call detected -- verify this is not exec(), execSync(), or execFileSync() with a dynamic argument
